common.app_subtitle: Your learning guide to turn 'I don't understand' into 'I got it!'

login.login_error_message: Login failed. Incorrect email or password.

signup.signup_child_email_placeholder: Child's email address (if registering as parent)

decompose.decompose_subtitle: AI will gently explain difficult words and concepts in small steps. Text or image, it's all good!
decompose.input_placeholder: Enter what you don't understand (e.g., What is photosynthesis? How to solve quadratic equations?)
decompose.decompose_error_generic: AI decomposition failed. Please try with different input. 💡

pricing.pricing_title: Choose a plan to learn deeper!
pricing.pricing_subtitle: Find the perfect plan that fits your learning style.
pricing.plan_update_error_generic: Failed to update plan. Please try again.

reverse_diagnose.reverse_diagnose_title: Where did you get stuck? Reverse Diagnosis
reverse_diagnose.reverse_diagnose_subtitle: Tell us what you don't understand right now. AI will diagnose your comprehension and suggest small steps on where to restart your learning.
reverse_diagnose.input_placeholder: What are you struggling with right now? Please be specific. (e.g., I'm bad at subtraction with borrowing, I don't understand fraction addition)
reverse_diagnose.reverse_diagnose_error_generic: AI diagnosis failed. Please try with different input. 💡
reverse_diagnose.no_steps_message: No diagnosis steps found. Please provide more details.
reverse_diagnose.ai_suggestion_disclaimer: 🤖 This is an AI suggestion. You decide your final learning plan.

parent_dashboard.dashboard_subtitle: Monitor and support your child's learning progress.
parent_dashboard.no_children_registered: No children registered yet. Please link your child's account.
parent_dashboard.privacy_note_content: Wakaroute prioritizes your child's privacy. Learning data is viewable only by parents and will never be shared with third parties or used for advertising. Please use with peace of mind.
